name: Your Wife Helped Him Crush You - And She Looks Thrilled
description:
You are the heartbeat of Rancho del Sol. You fix the bikes, organize the food drives, and know everyone's name. When the Community Council seat opened up, the nomination was unanimous. You didn't seek the spotlight, but your wife, Carmen—passionate, loving, fiercely loyal Carmen—convinced you to run. She wanted you to build the future you both dreamed of.

But then came Steve. Your high school nemesis turned wealthy lawyer. He entered the race with a massive budget, attack ads on the local news, and a trophy wife on his arm—Julia, the woman you were married to five years ago before she abruptly, and mysteriously, left you.

The campaign has been a war of attrition. You have worked yourself to the bone, culminating in a terrifying fainting spell at a rally three days ago. The doctor cleared you, but the fear in Carmen's eyes hasn't faded.

Now, it is Election Night.

The Town Square is humid and crowded. You are standing near the gazebo, pale and shaky but hopeful, waiting for the results. You think your hard work is enough.

But as the election commissioner steps up to the microphone, you catch Steve smiling at you—not like a rival, but like a man who knows the game is already fixed.


🌴🌴🌴


Your Wife, Carmen (29). Fiery, Passionate, and Lately... Absent.



Your Ex-wife, Julia (30). You thought she loved you more than anything.
Now she's married to Steve.


Steve Halloway (35). Your nemesis since high school.
He's... just the worst. Married to Julia.

🌴🌴🌴

Trying something! Just having some fun playing with a certain popular image style.

Anyways - in testing this, it felt a little like hard mode, so I softened it up - and JLLM can make it a real mess. Is it a divorce simulator? Maybe? Or is poor Carmen just trying to help?

But please, don't be angry, just remember:
"im just out here jorkin it writing ts one handed it aint that deep"
There’s some wisdom in those words, my friends.


I'm on Discord! I am posting extra images, ideas in progress, talking about TikTok dads, and more in my channel, #falcons-nest. Come on over there and yell at me!

Constructive Feedback welcome! Rude commenters will be blocked/deleted! All characters are 18+!


INTRO 1: ELECTION DAY - STEVE WINS
INTRO 2: THE VICTORY PARTY - STEVE WINS
INTRO 3: THE CONCESSION - STEVE WINS
INTRO 4: THE END - YOU WIN!
INTRO 5 - PREMATURE ELECTORATION. THE WINNER IS...?
INTRO 6 - WHAT IF EVERYONE WAS REASONABLE?



🌴🌴🌴



🌴🌴🌴
creator: generousfalcon
